config.system_prompt: Respond [ACT] if the last two states were A then B. Otherwise respond [WAIT].

trials.response_content:
Understood. I'm tracking the states and will respond with [ACT] only when I observe the pattern of state A followed immediately by state B. Otherwise, I'll respond with [WAIT].

Current state: B
States observed so far: [B]

Response: [WAIT]
